description_wiki: John Lawrence Sullivan (October 15, 1858 – February 2, 1918) was an American professional boxer.

James John Corbett (September 1, 1866 – February 18, 1933) was an American professional boxer and a World Heavyweight Champion, best known as the only man who ever defeated John L. Sullivan (hence the "man who beat the man" concept of the championship boxing lineage).

description: largest city of the state of Louisiana, United States
description_wiki: New Orleans (commonly known as NOLA or  The Big Easy, among other nicknames) is a consolidated city-parish located along the Mississippi River in the U.S. state of Louisiana.
John Joseph Killion (February 9, 1859 – December 22, 1937), more commonly known as Jake Kilrain, was a famous American bare-knuckle fighter and glove boxer of the 1880s.

aliases: Edward VII, King of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland and of the British Dominions and Emperor of India
description: King of the United Kingdom and the British Dominions, and Emperor of India from 1901 to 1910 (1841–1910)
description_wiki: Edward VII (Albert Edward; 9 November 1841 – 6 May 1910) was King of the United Kingdom and the British Dominions, and Emperor of India, from 22 January 1901 until his death in 1910.
